name: corvus
description: AI-powered Thunderbird extension with multi-provider support

scripts.dev:ui: cd src/ui && if node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const scripts=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')).scripts||{}; process.exit(scripts.dev ? 0 : 1)" >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm run dev; elif [ -f vite.config.ts ] || [ -f vite.config.js ] || [ -f vite.config.mjs ]; then npx vite build --watch --mode development; elif [ -f angular.json ]; then npx ng build --watch --configuration=development; else echo 'No supported UI dev configuration found' >&2; exit 1; fi
scripts.build: npm run build:background && npm run build:ui && npm run merge:ui
scripts.build:ui: cd src/ui && if node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const scripts=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')).scripts||{}; process.exit(scripts.build ? 0 : 1)" >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm run build; elif [ -f vite.config.ts ] || [ -f vite.config.js ] || [ -f vite.config.mjs ]; then npx vite build; elif [ -f angular.json ]; then npx ng build --configuration=production; else echo 'No supported UI build configuration found' >&2; exit 1; fi
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../corvus.xpi * -x '*.map'
scripts.lint:ui: cd src/ui && if node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const scripts=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')).scripts||{}; process.exit(scripts.lint ? 0 : 1)" >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm run lint; elif [ -f eslint.config.ts ] || [ -f eslint.config.js ] || [ -f eslint.config.mjs ] || [ -f eslint.config.cjs ] || [ -f .eslintrc ] || [ -f .eslintrc.js ] || [ -f .eslintrc.cjs ] || [ -f .eslintrc.json ]; then npx eslint .; else echo 'No UI lint configuration detected; skipping'; fi
scripts.test:ui: cd src/ui && if node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const scripts=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')).scripts||{}; process.exit(scripts.test ? 0 : 1)" >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm run test -- --runInBand --passWithNoTests; elif node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const scripts=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')).scripts||{}; process.exit(scripts.typecheck ? 0 : 1)" >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm run typecheck; elif ([ -f vite.config.ts ] || [ -f vite.config.js ] || [ -f vite.config.mjs ]) && [ -x "$(command -v npx)" ]; then npx vitest run --passWithNoTests; elif [ -f angular.json ]; then npx ng test --watch=false --code-coverage; else echo 'No supported UI test configuration found' >&2; exit 1; fi
